observations.summary: The phrase "I am Dagon. The power your father has chosen. Lord of Abundance." echoes the narrative context where Aviel worships Dagon, the fish god of abundance, highlighting the motif of Dagon as a deity associated with abundance and paternal choice.

source_evidence.quote: "I am Dagon. The power your father has chosen. Lord of Abundance." A pause the length of a slow tide. "Ask, and receive. My path is ease."

target_evidence.quote: Aviel, having brought the gods of Philistia with him, worships Dagon, the fish god of abundance.
